summary: P2 Features Testing Complete: Photographer pricing endpoints all working, dispatch tracking endpoint verified, friend markers code verified with yellow styling. Fixed RoleEnum comparison bug in PUT pricing endpoint.

ui_bugs.issue: Login flow not persisting session - user stays on /auth?tab=login after clicking Log In button with valid credentials. This is an existing auth issue, not related to P2 features.

action_items: Investigate frontend login session persistence issue - user not being logged in after clicking Log In with valid credentials
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: payments.py line 392 - RoleEnum comparison bug. Changed from comparing Enum against strings to comparing enum.value against strings
MapPage.js lines 427-465 - Friend markers correctly use yellow styling (bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-400 to-orange-400)
MapPage.js lines 1082-1128 - Dispatch tracking panel correctly displays when activeDispatch.status === 'en_route'
MapPage.js line 227 - updateTrackingMarkers function properly updates photographer and surfer markers with animations
MapPage.js lines 163-224 - Real-time GPS polling every 5 seconds when dispatch is en_route

success_rate.frontend: CODE VERIFIED - Unable to test UI due to login session issue

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Sarah Waters (Photographer) and Kelly Slater (Pro) accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P2 backend APIs verified working: GET/PUT photographer pricing, GET packages with custom pricing, dispatch tracking endpoint. Frontend MapPage.js has all P2 features implemented (friend markers yellow styling, dispatch tracking panel, updateTrackingMarkers function). Login session issue prevents UI testing in Playwright - API login works but frontend doesn't persist session.

photographer_pricing_endpoints.GET /api/payments/packages: PASS - Returns default packages with hourly_rate=50
photographer_pricing_endpoints.GET /api/payments/packages?photographer_: PASS - Returns packages with photographer's custom hourly rate
photographer_pricing_endpoints.PUT /api/payments/photographer/{id}/pric: PASS - Updates hourly rate (after bug fix)

dispatch_tracking.GET /api/dispatch/user/{id}/active: PASS - Returns active_dispatch object or null

friend_markers_ui.yellow_styling: CODE VERIFIED - lines 436-445 use from-yellow-400 to-orange-400
friend_markers_ui.friend_marker_icon: CODE VERIFIED - custom divIcon with avatar or initial

bug_fixed.issue: RoleEnum comparison against strings failed because photographer.role is RoleEnum type, not string
bug_fixed.fix: Added role_value extraction: role_value = photographer.role.value if hasattr(photographer.role, 'value') else photographer.role
